title: Karafka: statistics_emitted
description: Raw Kafka broker/consumer statistics emitted by the librdkafka statistics callback.

statistics.description: Raw librdkafka statistics payload. Shape is defined by librdkafka; see https://github.com/confluentinc/librdkafka/blob/master/STATISTICS.md

request_id.description: Rails request UUID, present on any event fired during a web request context. Merged globally by the Honeybadger agent.
